# AI Compliance Documents
> AI compliance documentation templates for 14+ US state laws, the EU AI Act, and federal frameworks. 36 packages covering employment AI laws, consumer data privacy laws, and universal governance documents.

## About
AI Compliance Documents generates compliance documentation templates for businesses subject to AI regulations. Customers answer a 10-minute questionnaire about their company and AI systems, pay once (no subscription), and download customized fillable PDF documents instantly. Prices range from $49 to $997. Each package is built from the actual enacted statute text — not summaries, not training data, not paraphrases. We are not a law firm and do not provide legal advice.

## State Employment AI Laws
- Illinois HB3773 ($299): /regulations/illinois-hb3773
- NYC Local Law 144 ($399): /regulations/nyc-local-law-144
- Colorado SB 24-205 ($449): /regulations/colorado-sb24-205
- Multi-State Employer AI Disclosure ($299): /regulations/multi-state-employer-ai-disclosure

- New Jersey NJDPA ($249): /regulations/new-jersey-njdpa

## Important
All documents are templates for compliance planning purposes. They do not constitute legal advice. AI Compliance Documents is not a law firm. Consult a licensed attorney to verify applicability to your specific situation.
